headline: Woman's 'Clean Girl Aesthetic' Video Accidentally Revealed Her 'Doom Pile' In The Background
summary: The pile has been named 'Pile-ippa' and has 47,000 followers on a parody account.
fullBody: Ava Aesthetic posted a 'clean girl morning routine' video. In the background, viewers spotted a mountain of laundry, 47 water bottles, and what appeared to be a pizza box from last week. 'It's called depth,' Ava explained. The laundry pile has gained 47,000 followers on a parody account called 'The Reality Pile.' Ava has since posted a 'realistic morning routine' featuring the pile. It got more views than her clean video.
